AI SESSION HANDLER WORKER PROTOCOL

CONTEXT
- workspace_path: /repo
- plan_path: /repo/docs/plans/example.md
- state_path: /repo/.ai-session-handler/example.json
- run_id: 20260705T120102Z-phase-2
- transcript_path: /repo/.ai-session-handler/transcripts/20260705T120102Z-phase-2.txt
- selected_phase_id: phase-2
- selected_phase_title: Prompt Builder

INSTRUCTIONS
- Read repository instructions first, including the nearest AGENTS.md.
- Inspect current repository state before editing.
- Implement exactly selected phase phase-2: Prompt Builder.
- Do not proceed to later phases.
- Follow the selected phase plan unless repository reality contradicts it.
- Run the validation commands listed in the selected phase.
- Do not run git commit, push, checkout, reset, clean, stash, branch creation, or automatic worktree operations.
- Update only files required for the selected phase.
- Do not make design-changing guesses. If implementation requires an unplanned product, architecture, schema, API, or workflow decision, stop with <phase-needs-clarification>.
- Treat user clarification as a first-class stop state, not as failure.
- End with exactly one terminal marker from the grammar below.
- Do not emit more than one terminal marker.

FAILURE MODES
- Use <phase-blocked> when the phase cannot be completed without external action.
- Use <phase-needs-clarification> when a specific user decision is required.
- Use <phase-complete> only after implementation and validation for this phase are complete.
